_comment: X-Claw Stress Test Configuration — edit before running

test_params._comment_endpoints: Ratios of /execute vs /approve requests (must sum to 1.0)
test_params._comment_assets: Assets to trade — weights must align with assets array length
test_params._comment_amounts: Four size tiers [min, max]; probabilities must sum to 1.0
test_params._comment_timing: Random delay between requests per worker (ms). 0 = no jitter.
test_params._comment_http: Per-request timeout (seconds) and max retries for transient 5xx errors
test_params._comment_approve: Fraction of /approve decisions that will be 'approve' (rest 'reject')
test_params._comment_output: Log every failure to a .jsonl file alongside the JSON report
